summary: Iteration 168: Category List/Search UX and Delete/Undo Features testing complete. All 11 backend tests passed (2 from original cascade tests + 9 new list UX tests). Frontend UI verified with all required elements present.
critical_code_review_comments: i18n_missing_key console warnings for various auth.login.* keys - not blocking but consider adding translations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 168 features fully verified: category list filters, search, sort, issue badges, delete cascade with undo bar, undo history panel.

category_list_search_ux.issue_state_filter: PASS - 'Sorunlu Kayıtlar' filter button visible and functional
category_list_search_ux.search_input: PASS - 'Ad / slug ara' placeholder input present with data-testid='categories-list-filter-search-input'
category_list_search_ux.filter_chips: PASS - Active filter chips displayed with 'Filtreleri Temizle' button
category_list_search_ux.image_filters: PASS - Tüm Görsel Durumları/Görselli/Görselsiz buttons present

undo_history_panel.title: PASS - 'Son 24 Saat Silme/Undo Geçmişi' displayed
undo_history_panel.item_statuses: PASS - Geri Alındı/Aktif/Süresi Doldu badges shown

backend_cascade_delete.history_api: PASS - GET /api/admin/categories/delete-operations returns items list with pagination

cache_regression.create_updates_list: PASS - Created category appears in list immediately
cache_regression.delete_removes_from_list: PASS - Deleted category removed from list
cache_regression.undo_restores_to_list: PASS - Undone category reappears in list

search_sort: Search input with 'Ad / slug ara' placeholder
undo_history: Operation items with: operation_id, deleted count, created_at
Status badges: Geri Alındı, Aktif, Süresi Doldu
